title: Review widget lifecycle and disposal
description: Read Flutter widgets and report side effects in build, undisposed resources, and mutation outside the update path.
body: Use when asked whether a Flutter widget is correct. Actions: inspect each build method for side effects, controller creation, or heavy work; check that every controller, subscription, animation, and timer created in a State is released in dispose(); and verify state changes flow through setState or the state-management path rather than in-place mutation. Do not assume the framework disposes resources a State created. Report and record each impure build, undisposed resource, and out-of-band mutation with file and line. This skill is read-only and must not refactor state ownership without runtime permission. Validation signals include identifying a controller created without a matching dispose. Risk boundary: flag an undisposed controller/subscription as a memory-leak and setState-after-dispose risk, and side effects in build as a duplicate-effect defect.
